finding: More severely + frequently affected after renal transplantation

differentials.name: Progressive distention + pseudoobstruction Contributing factors:   dehydration, alteration of diet, inactivity, nonabsorbable antacids, high-dose steroids
differentials.raw: Progressive distention + pseudoobstruction Contributing factors:   dehydration, alteration of diet, inactivity, nonabsorbable antacids, high-dose steroids

differentials.name: Ischemic colitis (a)  primary disease responsible for end-stage renal disease: eg, diabetes, vasculitis (b)  trauma of renal transplantation
differentials.raw: Ischemic colitis (a)  primary disease responsible for end-stage renal disease: eg, diabetes, vasculitis (b)  trauma of renal transplantation

differentials.name: Diverticulitis Contributing factors:   chronic obstipation, steroids, autonomic nervous dysfunction
differentials.raw: Diverticulitis Contributing factors:   chronic obstipation, steroids, autonomic nervous dysfunction
